user_request: I want to build a podcast summariser that takes audio, transcribes it, summarises the text, and generates a short audio summary.
task_analysis: The user wants to build a system that transcribes audio from a podcast, summarises the text, and generates a short audio summary.

steps.title: Transcribe Audio
steps.description: Convert spoken words in the audio to text.
steps.input_description: Audio file of a podcast episode
steps.output_description: Transcribed text of the podcast episode

steps.title: Summarise Text
steps.description: Generate a summary of the transcribed text.
steps.input_description: Transcribed text of the podcast episode

steps.title: Generate Audio Summary
steps.description: Convert the summary text into an audio file.
steps.output_description: Short audio summary of the podcast episode

step_benchmarks.recommendation_reason: Recommended openai/whisper-large-v3 as the primary candidate for speech_to_text. Non-text models are ranked by known quality characteristics rather than live benchmarking.

rankings.output_sample: [Whisper-Large-v3] — Specialized speech_to_text model. Live benchmarking requires modality-specific evaluation.
[Whisper-Large-v3-Turbo] — Specialized speech_to_text model. Live benchmarking requires modality-specific evaluation.

step_benchmarks.recommendation_reason: Recommended Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct for 'Summarise Text'. | Quality: 0.648 | Latency: 0.47s | Runner-up: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct (quality=0.782, latency=1.14s)

rankings.output_sample: The text is a sample for summarization.
The text is a sample for summarization purposes, containing no specific information to summarize.
There is no text to summarize. You provided a sample text for summarization, but no actual text was given. Please provide the text you would like me to summarize.

step_benchmarks.recommendation_reason: Recommended facebook/mms-tts-eng as the primary candidate for text_to_speech. Non-text models are ranked by known quality characteristics rather than live benchmarking.

rankings.output_sample: [MMS-TTS-English] — Specialized text_to_speech model. Live benchmarking requires modality-specific evaluation.
[ESPnet-VITS] — Specialized text_to_speech model. Live benchmarking requires modality-specific evaluation.
